content.question: What proportion of the 1,200+ settlements without public educational institutions had historical 6- or 8-year gimnázium capacity, and what is the current transport radius required to serve age 10-12 selection candidates from these settlements if early-track places are concentrated in regional centers?
content.reduction_path: Map the geographic distribution of 6-/8-year track locations and modeled commute times from each settlement cohort; conduct a transport-feasibility assessment for settlements at varying distances from the nearest early-selective track, distinguishing daily commute versus boarding requirements.
